## Task Card
- [ ] 已附任务卡链接或正文

## Design Review
- [ ] 已附 `DESIGN_REVIEW` 评论链接

## Implementation Plan
- [ ] 已附 implementation plan 链接

## Test Report
- [ ] 已附 `TEST_REPORT` 评论链接或测试证据

## Collaboration Protocol
- [ ] 已发 `STARTED`
- [ ] 范围变化时已发 `UPDATED`
- [ ] 阻塞时已发 `BLOCKED`
- [ ] 完成后将发 `DONE`

## Owner Agent
- [ ] 已填写主责 AGENT
